scenario.name: UAS — Answer incoming call
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [last_cseq_number] INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [last_cseq_number] INVITE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sipp 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIPp Answer c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 8000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=sendrecv
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [last_cseq_number] BYE Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
